'''Falkenharn Repulsors''' was a manufacturing corporation known for producing quality [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] cargo handlers for over fifty [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. Their products were for personal and business use, such as the [[Mark V14 baggage handler]].

{{Company-stub}}
